name: Mill Creek Tennis Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Mill Creek Tennis Complex in Statesboro, GA! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, food, and water.

name: Sue Oertly Courts
description: Sue Oertly Courts is a place to play pickleball in Statesboro, GA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to lights and restrooms.
